titleStmt.title: SII 17.624: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 624. (A.R. No. 578 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Satyavāchakēśvara temple.
This inscription commences with the praśasti Pugaḻmādu viḷaṅga etc., of the king.

It records an allotment of fallow lands belonging to the temple to various persons, for reclamation and contribution of paddy for śrībali and other offerings to God Ālaviḍaṅgadēvar, the deity taken out on procession in the temple, his consort Paḷḷiaṟai Nambirāṭṭiyār of the inner apartment and Chandraśēkharadēva. Puliyan Arumoḻidēvaṉ, the kiḻavaṉ of Pālaiyūr who appears as the signatory of the record was one of the persons to whom land was allotted.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
... svastiśrī (rī) . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭicūṭi minavar nilaikeṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉai maṉnavar Iriyaluṟṟiḻitara tikkaṉaittum tancakkara naṭānti virasiṅhāsanattu Ulakuṭaiyā ḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecarivanmarāna cakravatthikaḷ śrīkulottuṅka coḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 4 10 8 Āvatu keyamāṇikka vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvārurk kū
paravaikkuḷam nilam2va2l teṉkaṇṭam Aripaṭarntu tiṭalum kuḻiyumāyk kiṭantamaiyil Ittevar koyil tiruvussavaṅkaḷ Eḻuntaruḷum Ālaviṭaṅkadevarkkum Ivar nam pirāṭṭiyārkkum Uḷḷālaip paḷḷi Āṟai nampirāṭṭiyārkkum śrīpali Eḻunḻu and n interposed.taruḷum śantracekaradevarkkum munpu tiruvamutu Illāmaiyil tirutti kuḻi 1 kku 3 pa Āka Ik koyil nilanivantamuṭaiya pālaiyūrkiḻavaṉ puliyan Arumoḻitevaṉ kuḻi 7 10 2 kku I�ḷa Ikkoyil te

kkāy 8 kkum Ilaiyamutu 3 10kkum Iṭalata 2 10 kkum Ā 1 ḷ 1 kku 1 Āka ḷ 3 100 6 10 ṉukku I 7 1000 3 100 1m Eṇṇāḻiyum vaḷukkamaravu �lāle śrī māyeśvara kkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷ kaṇkāṇi var paṇṭārattaḷakka sandrāditthaval śāśvadiyamāka nimantañ ceyvatāka kal veṭṭuvittom Ivvaṉaivom Itu panmāyeśvararakṣai Ippaṭikku Ivai pālaiyūr kiḻavaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 17.624 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
